'''chakuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khargosh|khargosh]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-k-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khargosh|khargosh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chakuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chækichith|chækichith]] || [[word:chækichij|chækichij]] || [[word:chækichish|chækichish]] || [[word:chækichi|chækichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chakukuchuth|chakukuchuth]] || [[word:chakukuchuj|chakukuchuj]] || [[word:chakukuchush|chakukuchush]] || [[word:chakukuchu|chakukuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chakuchuth|chakuchuth]] || [[word:chakuchuj|chakuchuj]] || [[word:chakuchush|chakuchush]] || [[word:chakuchu|chakuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chakufchuth|chakufchuth]] || [[word:chakufchuj|chakufchuj]] || [[word:chakufchush|chakufchush]] || [[word:chakufchuf|chakufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chakuchuthu|chakuchuthu]] || [[word:chakuchuju|chakuchuju]] || [[word:chakuchushu|chakuchushu]] || [[word:chakuchuku|chakuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chakuchuth|chakuchuth]] || [[word:chakuchuj|chakuchuj]] || [[word:chakuchush|chakuchush]] || [[word:chakuchu|chakuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chakuchuthul|chakuchuthul]] || [[word:chakuchujul|chakuchujul]] || [[word:chakuchushul|chakuchushul]] || [[word:chakuchukul|chakuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chakuchuthuthu|chakuchuthuthu]] || [[word:chakuchujuju|chakuchujuju]] || [[word:chakuchushushu|chakuchushushu]] || [[word:chakuchuku|chakuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chakuchuthun|chakuchuthun]] || [[word:chakuchujun|chakuchujun]] || [[word:chakuchushun|chakuchushun]] || [[word:chakuchukun|chakuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chakuchuthuoro|chakuchuthuoro]] || [[word:chakuchujuoro|chakuchujuoro]] || [[word:chakuchushuoro|chakuchushuoro]] || [[word:chakuchukuoro|chakuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
